records.description: Iris wont open up
records.short_description: IRIS issue
records.close_notes:
After restarting she was able to load bomgar.
I called her in teams and connected via bomgar.
I manually cleared the Edge cache and reset the browser.
I enabled the OMNI extension for Edge.
I cleared the Java temp files.
She was able to login to Genesys and IRIS this time.
She was running on Wifi and is going to plug into the modem with her ethernet cable and let me know if she has any issues.
If no further issues I'll close the ticket in 15 minutes.

records.description: Sending in a request re: IRIS Front-End Read-Only access for Richard Carlson's team (as well as setting up some basic training on IRIS). Requesting after talking with Melissa Ayo; Christine Hoppe, to document where we last left off for everyone. Basically, just making sure that the info is somewhere that can be referenced for you guys. The Goal of the access is to assist in our back-end IRIS work: we have some processes that would benefit from getting a look at the front, relative to the back end. Our team specifically wants Read-Only access.  When we last left off, some customer service roles in IRIS were identified as a possible fit. A custom role was discussed, but tabled for later conversations after the busy season, etc.  One team member has some IRIS access, and shared his IRIS info w/ Melissa to double check if any of those would work for the Read-Only role.
records.short_description: IRIS Front-End Read-Only access for Richard Carlson's team

records.description: I was calling because I'm having issues with my Iris for some reason umm, it's been going on a couple of days now. It's either when I log in, it either gives me like weird like screen that pops up or like sometimes it pauses and freezes or it just doesn't. You can't like copy and paste or anything like that. It gives you like all these weird messages about the connection and everything like that. So I'm not sure what's going on with it. My supervisor told me to reach out to IT to see if I can assist.
